name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 30-hour battery life. Multipoint connection lets you pair two Bluetooth devices simultaneously. Crystal clear hands-free calling.

name: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)
description: Active Noise Cancellation with Adaptive Transparency mode. USB-C charging case with up to 30 hours total battery. H2 chip for extraordinary sound.

name: Samsung 65" 4K QLED TV
description: Quantum Dot technology with 100% Color Volume. Neo Quantum Processor 4K. Object Tracking Sound+ for immersive audio that follows the action.

name: iPad Pro 11" M4
description: Ultra Retina XDR display with tandem OLED. M4 chip for breakthrough performance. Apple Pencil Pro support with Apple Intelligence.

name: DJI Mini 4 Pro Drone
description: Under 249g with omnidirectional obstacle sensing. 4K/60fps video with 10-bit D-Log M color profile. 34-minute max flight time.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: 8000 DPI high-precision sensor works on any surface including glass. Ultra-fast MagSpeed electromagnetic scrolling. USB-C quiet clicks.

name: Nike Air Max 270 Sneakers
description: Inspired by Air Max icons of the past. The Max Air unit delivers all-day comfort with a distinctive look. Breathable mesh upper with foam midsole.

name: Champion Reverse Weave Hoodie
description: Iconic Reverse Weave construction reduces shrinkage. Kangaroo pocket with ribbed side panels. Pre-shrunk 82% cotton fleece blend.

name: Levi's 501 Original Jeans
description: The original jean since 1873. Straight fit with a button fly. Made from 100% rigid denim that molds to your body over time.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 23
description: Lightstrike Pro cushioning with Continental Rubber outsole. Primeknit+ upper that adapts to your foot. Linear Energy Push system returns energy with every step.

name: Carhartt WIP Beanie
description: Classic acrylic watch hat with a fold-up cuff. Stretchable knit construction for a comfortable fit. The original streetwear essential.

name: Yerba Mate Energy Variety Pack
description: 12-pack assortment of flavored Yerba Mate drinks. 150mg natural caffeine per can. Zero sugar options included. Fan favorite: mint, raspberry, lemon ginger.

name: Kind Protein Bars (12-pack)
description: 12g protein per bar with whole nuts as the #1 ingredient. Gluten-free and low glycemic. Dark chocolate nuts & sea salt, peanut butter, and almond flavors.

name: Artisan Cold Brew Coffee (6-pack)
description: Small-batch cold brewed for 20 hours. Notes of chocolate and caramel. 200mg caffeine per 11oz bottle. Black, oat milk, and vanilla latte varieties.

name: Organic Acai Berry Smoothie Packs
description: 4 individually frozen packs of authentic Brazilian acai. USDA organic. No added sugar. High in antioxidants and Omega-9 fatty acids. Perfect for bowls or smoothies.

name: Chomps Beef Jerky Sticks (24-pack)
description: 100% grass-fed beef with no added sugar. Gluten-free, paleo, and whole30 approved. Original, pepper, and jalapeño flavors. 9g protein per stick.

name: Hydro Flask 32oz Water Bottle
description: TempShield double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold 24 hours, hot 12 hours. 18/8 pro-grade stainless steel. Wide mouth with leak-proof flex cap.

name: Manduka PRO Yoga Mat
description: 6mm ultra-dense cushioning for superior support. Lifetime guarantee. Closed-cell surface prevents moisture absorption. Non-slip grip in any position.

name: Garmin Forerunner 265 GPS Watch
description: AMOLED color touchscreen with up to 15-day battery life. Advanced running metrics with HRV status. Morning report with daily suggested workouts.

name: TRX GO Suspension Trainer
description: Lightweight 1.3lb design for home or travel workouts. Tested to 1,400lbs. Includes TRX Training Club 1-month free trial. Works for all fitness levels.

name: Peloton Resistance Bands Set
description: 5 resistance levels from light to extra-heavy. 100% natural latex. Anti-snap technology with reinforced edges. Includes carry bag and workout guide.

name: Dyson V15 Detect Vacuum
description: Laser reveals invisible dust on hard floors. Acoustic piezo sensor counts and sizes particles in real-time. 60-minute run time with Hair Screw tool included.

name: Philips Hue Smart Bulb Starter Kit
description: 4 white and color ambiance smart bulbs + Hue Bridge. 16 million colors and whites. Works with Alexa, Google Assistant, and Apple HomeKit.

name: Ember Temperature Control Mug 2
description: Set your ideal drinking temperature and Ember Mug 2 maintains it for up to 80 minutes. Auto sleep mode extends battery life. App-controlled with 10-oz and 14-oz sizes.

name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1
description: 7 appliances in one: pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, yogurt maker, warmer. 6-quart capacity with 13 one-touch programs.

name: Govee RGBIC Floor Lamp
description: RGBIC technology for multi-color display simultaneously. Music sync mode reacts to sound in real-time. App + voice control. 16 million colors with DIY scenes.

name: Fenty Beauty Pro Filt'r Foundation
description: 40 shades of long-wearing, skin-smoothing, pore-diffusing foundation. Buildable medium-to-full coverage. Oil-free formula with a soft-matte finish. SPF 15.

name: Glow Recipe Watermelon Niacinamide Dew Drops
description: Brightening serum with 10% niacinamide and watermelon extract. Minimizes pores and improves uneven skin tone. Vegan and cruelty-free. Dermatologist tested.

name: Dyson Airwrap Multi-Styler
description: Styles and dries simultaneously without extreme heat. Coanda effect for curls, waves, and volume. 6 attachments included. Works on multiple hair types.

name: Charlotte Tilbury Pillow Talk Lip Kit
description: Iconic lip duo: Matte Revolution Lipstick + Lip Cheat liner in the legendary Pillow Talk shade. Comfortable long-wearing formula. #1 bestseller worldwide.
